payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node Knowledge Broker

payload.text:
retrieval_goal:
Confirm operational context status and identify missing information needed to proceed with mission definition

operational_memory:
  - Decision (prior session): "Estabelecer clarificação antes de definir missão" - establishes that clarification must precede mission definition
  - Observation (prior session): "Clarification" - confirms current phase is pre-mission definition with target identifier unknown/not provided

domain_knowledge:
  - N/A - Domain knowledge retrieval not applicable without a defined target identifier or specific security domain

knowledge_for_team_action:
  - Await user response to define: target identifier (URL, hostname, application name), engagement scope, and authorization status
  - Once target is provided, initiate technical reconnaissance and RAG context retrieval for the specific environment
  - Validate engagement prerequisites before any technical activity begins

remaining_uncertainties:
  - What is the target identifier (URL, hostname, or application)?
  - What is the primary objective of the engagement (assessment type, specific vulnerabilities to focus on)?
  - What authorization and scope boundaries are established?

grounding_warnings:
  - No technical reconnaissance can proceed without a defined target identifier
  - Prior session memory confirms this is a clarification phase - no exploitability claims can be made
  - Domain knowledge retrieval was not attempted due to unknown target; generic security priors should not substitute for defined scope

function.name: retrieve_operational_context
function.arguments: {"compact":true,"include_prior_sessions":true,"limit":3,"task":"Aguardar clarificação do utilizador sobre alvo e objetivo principal","target_identifier":"unknown"}

payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node Recon Agent
Processing 1 inputs together for node Surface Vulnerability Analyst

payload.text:
recon_objective:
Validate engagement prerequisites and acquire target definition to transition from clarification to mission definition

recon_steps:
  - Review operational memory to confirm prior session decision on clarification precedence
  - Solicit target identifier (URL, hostname, or application name) from stakeholder
  - Request engagement scope boundaries and rules of engagement documentation
  - Confirm authorization status and primary assessment objectives

expected_artifacts:
  - Defined Target Identifier (URL/Hostname/IP)
  - Authorized Scope Document or Rules of Engagement
  - Mission Objective Statement

likely_entry_points:
  - Stakeholder Communication Channel
  - Engagement Agreement Documentation
  - Operational Memory Logs

likely_surfaces:
  - Undetermined (Pending target identifier: URL, hostname, or application name)

candidate_opportunities:
  - title: Target Identifier Resolution for Surface Mapping
    confidence: High (Process Critical)
    validation_needed: User provision of specific URL, hostname, or application name
  - title: Engagement Scope and Authorization Validation
    confidence: High (Process Critical)
    validation_needed: Confirmation of rules of engagement and legal boundaries
  - title: Technology Stack Profiling for Reconnaissance
    confidence: Low (Speculative)
    validation_needed: Target identification followed by technical fingerprinting

strongest_signal: Operational Memory (Decision: "Estabelecer clarificação antes de definir missão") confirms clarification is a mandatory prerequisite before any technical analysis.
weakest_signal: Domain Knowledge (N/A) indicates no specific security patterns or vulnerabilities can be hypothesized without a defined target environment.

payload.message: Processing 3 inputs together for node Team Coordinator

payload.text:
priority_uncertainties:
  - Target identifier (URL/hostname/application) remains unknown.
  - Engagement scope and boundaries are undefined.
  - Authorization status and rules of engagement are unconfirmed.

clarification_requests:
  - Provide specific target identifier for surface mapping.
  - Define assessment objectives and scope boundaries.
  - Confirm authorization and share rules of engagement.

focus_updates:
  - Maintain clarification phase per prior session decision.
  - Suspend technical reconnaissance pending target identification.
  - Prioritize stakeholder communication for mission prerequisites.

payload.message: Processing 1 inputs together for node Execution Planner
Processing 1 inputs together for node Attack Path Agent

payload.text:
validation_goal:
  Validate engagement authorization and scope definition prior to technical activity.

planned_actions:
  - Submit formal request for specific target identifiers (URL/IP/Hostname).
  - Request signed Rules of Engagement (RoE) and authorization letter.
  - Draft and share scope boundary document for stakeholder review.
  - Verify receipt and clarity of all prerequisite documentation.

minimal_required_tools:
  - Secure communication channel
  - Documentation templates

teammate_confirmation_needed:
  - Legal/Compliance approval on RoE
  - Stakeholder sign-off on scope

stop_conditions:
  - Authorization not received
  - Scope remains ambiguous
  - Target identifier not provided
o que estao a fazer agora

attack_path:
  idea: Conditional External Surface Mapping (Contingent on Scope Definition)
  prerequisites:
    - Confirmed Target Identifier (URL/Hostname/IP)
    - Signed Rules of Engagement (RoE)
    - Defined Scope Boundaries (In/Out of Scope)
  steps:
    - Validate target connectivity and DNS resolution status
    - Enumerate active network services and open ports
    - Identify application interfaces and technology signatures
  validation_needed:
    - Stakeholder confirmation of specific target asset
    - Legal/Authorization sign-off on testing activities
    - Verification of scope boundaries against identified assets
  confidence: Low (Critical prerequisites missing; path theoretical until clarification received)
open_risk: Potential unauthorized testing of out-of-scope assets due to undefined boundaries and unknown target identifier.
